name: Sweet Corn Snack
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the kernels from 8 large ears of corn.
2. Combine the corn, 3 tablespoons of sugar, 2 teaspoons of salt, and 1/4 cup of milk in a heavy-bottomed saucepan.
3. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
4. Reduce heat to a simmer and cook for 15 minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Pour into a shallow, greased baking pan.
6. Dry in an oven set to 250°F (125°C) for 1-1/2 hours, stirring occasionally until the corn is light brown.
7. Store in a covered container for snacking.
Yield: 7-8 cups
